title: Ancient Explosives
description: This mod adds an ancient kind of explosives making use of the echo shards.
body:
# Ancient Explosives

This mod adds 7 new items and 2 blocks that are all related to the ancient city and vibration/sound. This mod also gives a new drop to the warden to reward the players who kill it.  

_Go see the [Wiki](https://github.com/Tomeoprod/Fabric-AncientExplosives-1.21.8/wiki) for more detail_

If you have any suggestions ,want to see the other mods or just want to know when an update is out, feel free to join my [Discrod Server](https://discord.gg/ah3gRpT7uH)
